descFull: A hand-curated, topic-organized library of the best ML education — 923 docs (391 arXiv papers, 474 Stanford/MIT/Karpathy/fast.ai lectures, 58 explainer articles), normalized to Markdown with full provenance. Open it in Obsidian or point your agent at it. A clean ML corpus for learning, RAG & fine-tuning.
